commands: bash -c 'set -e; su - ubuntu -c \"cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system && git pull origin main\"; cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/infra; echo "=== REBUILDING FRAME-PROCESSOR ==="; docker-compose build --no-cache frame-processor; echo "=== STARTING FRAME-PROCESSOR ==="; docker-compose up -d frame-processor; sleep 5; docker ps'
